name: Scout Camp: Scary Nights in the Forest

reviews.review_description: The game is honestly so great and so fun, but sometimes they can get empty, especially for some time zones but I’m guessing this is a new game anyways and there’s also a couple of bugs but luckily they’re being worked on. It’s really fun, especially with friends.

The title says it all. It IS a port of 99 nights in the forest from roblox. Now is it a 1:1? No. There are things it still need to add. Smooth turning (even though the snap isn't even that bad, and I HATE snap turn) ranged weapons. And the ability to hold a spear outward instead of like a sword. But overall? Im in love. And it has an extraction mode that DEFINITELY isn't in the roblox 99 nights and is much much more horrifying than anything that game could do. And for it to be in vr is even worse x.x love this game and will be following the development closely!!

Probably one of the more well polished gtag fan games, and it actually feels like you're playing 99 nights. 

Five star ⭐
yo ts so peak i cried
Its a great game i would recommend if you love survival and adventure games

developer_response.body:
Hi MondayVr,

developer_response.body:
Hi Y4JR!

Thanks a lot for your feedback — awesome to hear you’re enjoying the game.

Glad you like the vibe! Be sure to jump in regularly — we’re constantly adding new features and improving the experience.

If you have any ideas or suggestions, feel free to share them on Discord: https://discord.gg/scoutcamp or email us at info@dream-dev.com

Thank you!

Regards,
Horizon Lab

reviews.review_description: Its great but when i play the game i don't get currency

developer_response.body:
Hi Hunteyford13!

Thanks for your feedback — glad you’re enjoying the game.

Could you please tell us more details? At what moment did you not receive currency, and what exactly didn’t get credited? Or do you mean you’d like to earn more free in-game currency?

We’d really appreciate it if you could revisit your rating once the issue is resolved and consider updating it to 5⭐

Feel free to reach out on Discord: https://discord.gg/scoutcamp or email us at info@dream-dev.com

Thank you!

Regards,
Horizon Lab.
